attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.ATTACHED_DOCUMENT_ID, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.DOCUMENT_ID, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.SEQ_NUM, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.ENTITY_NAME, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.PK1_VALUE, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.PK2_VALUE, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.PK3_VALUE, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.PK4_VALUE, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.PK5_VALUE, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.AUTOMATICALLY_ADDED_FLAG, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.COLUMN1, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.APP_SOURCE_VERSION, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.CATEGORY_ID, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.STATUS, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS,
(
select ATTACHED_DOCUMENT_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS
minus
select ATTACHED_DOCUMENT_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS
) ACM
where 
 ACM.ATTACHED_DOCUMENT_ID = STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.ATTACHED_DOCUMENT_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_FND_ATTA_DOCUMENTS.REFRESH_DATETIME
